openai.detail: Codex CLI 0.142.0-alpha.6 found the isolated project and accepted the explicit $simple-dev prompt, but the provider-backed run did not complete: the sandboxed attempt could not reach OpenAI and the approved network attempt produced no result before timeout. Discovery plus invocation is therefore not claimed as a passing native smoke test.

claude.detail: Claude Code is not installed in the current environment; only source and adapter format compatibility were checked.

generic.detail: The canonical package passed Agent Skills structure, archive safety, and temporary installation checks; no specific generic client runtime was tested.

vscode.detail: VS Code CLI is not installed in the current environment; only source and adapter format compatibility were checked.
